json.chatInput:
I want to build a simple AI Agent as my first project. Please help me create a beginner-friendly AI agent with clear features, simple architecture, and easy implementation steps.
Job Application Assistant

User can add job details
Agent can suggest follow-up messages
Agent can give interview preparation tips based on the job role
Since this is my first AI agent project, keep it simple and avoid complex integrations.

Requirements:

Build a simple web-based AI chat interface
Add user input box and chat response area
Use an LLM API for generating answers
Keep the UI clean, modern, and beginner-friendly
Add basic error handling
Add loading state while the AI is responding
Store chat history locally or in a simple database
Make it mobile responsive

Recommended stack:

Frontend: React or Next.js
Backend: Node.js / Express or FastAPI
AI Model: OpenAI API or any simple LLM API
Database: Supabase or local storage for MVP

Core Features:

User can type a question
AI agent replies clearly
Chat history is visible
Clear chat button
Simple welcome message
Basic safety message when the agent cannot answer confidently

Project Goal:
Create a simple AI Agent MVP that demonstrates:

AI chat functionality
Clean UI
Practical use case
Beginner-friendly implementation
Easy future upgrades

Future upgrade ideas:

Upload PDF documents
Add voice input
Add user login
Add document-based answers
Add reminders or email integration
Add analytics dashboard

Please generate:

Project idea
Feature list
Page structure
Database structure if needed
UI design suggestion
Step-by-step build plan
Basic system prompt for the AI agent
Future improvement roadmap

Keep the project simple because this is my first AI agent project.
